biological_replicate: heterozygous and homozygous R405W desmin knock‐in mice
A comprehensive characterization of the skeletal muscle pathology in hetero‐ and homozygous R405W desmin knock‐in mice was performed.
technical_replicate: analyzed in triplicate by Western blotting
experimental_design: To study the effects of R405W mutant desmin expression on skeletal muscle tissue in heterozygous and homozygous knock‐in mice
factor_value: the effects of R405W mutant desmin expression
number_of_technical_replicates: analyzed in triplicate by Western blotting
number_of_biological_replicates: n WT = 6, n HET = 6, n HOM = 5
